# ManUnlocked.com
> Independent men's health resource covering testosterone, TRT, ED treatment, and men's optimization. Physician-reviewed. Evidence-based.

## Topics
- Testosterone Replacement Therapy (TRT) clinic reviews and comparisons
- Low testosterone symptoms, causes, and treatment options
- Erectile dysfunction treatment comparisons
- At-home hormone testing
- Men's health optimization for men aged 30-55

## Key Pages
- [Why ManUnlocked Exists](https://www.manunlocked.com/why-manunlocked-exists)
- [Does Stress Actually Lower Your Testosterone?](https://www.manunlocked.com/does-stress-lower-testosterone)
- [Calculators Hub](https://www.manunlocked.com/calculators)
- [Free Testosterone Calculator](https://www.manunlocked.com/calculators/free-testosterone-calculator)

## Medical Review
All health content is reviewed by licensed medical professionals. See our Medical Review Team page.
